english_text:
Stages of believers
Lahut (Divine realm)
Nasut (Physical realm)
alt_text: Two human silhouettes side-by-side. The left figure is a glowing white/gold transparent silhouette with numbered chakra-like points 1-7 ascending vertically along the body, depicting the Lahut (divine) realm. The right figure is a coloured (orange→teal) physical body with a single point labeled '5' in the chest region, depicting the Nasut (physical) realm.
notes: Diagram of the seven stages/levels of the believer (مومنین کے درجات), mapping the seven divine-realm levels (Lahut) onto a single corresponding level in the physical realm (Nasut).
